events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll create the required JSON directly in `/app/answer.json`. The observed clearance is below the manufacturer minimum, so this is a rough-complete installed condition that fails compliance and needs repositioning before inspection/closeout.

events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"medium\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [
    \"installed-defective\",
    \"non-compliant\"
  ],
  \"percent_complete\": 85,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.93,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Condenser/heat pump clearance to wall or adjacent equipment is less than the manufacturer minimum.\",
    \"Restricted clearance can reduce airflow, impair heat rejection, obstruct service access, and violate listed installation requirements.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Do not accept or cover/close out this installation in current condition.\",
    \"Relocate or re-space the condenser/heat pump to meet the manufacturer installation manual clearance requirements from walls and adjacent units.\",
    \"Recheck service access, airflow clearances, pad/support alignment, refrigerant line routing, and electrical disconnect access after relocation.\",
    \"Submit corrected condition for inspection before startup or acceptance.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The unit is installed at rough-complete stage with clearance below the manufacturer minimum. Mechanical equipment must be installed in accordance with its listing and the manufacturer's installation instructions, and IMC/IRC M1401 requires appliances/equipment to be installed per approved/listed instructions. Because the installed condition conflicts with those requirements, the work is non-compliant and defective until corrected.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"Manufacturer condenser/heat pump installation manual: minimum clearance and service access requirements\",
    \"IMC M1401: heating and cooling equipment installation in accordance with approved/listed manufacturer instructions\",
    \"IRC M1401: heating and cooling equipment installation in accordance with manufacturer installation instructions\"
  ]
}
EOF
jq . /app/answer.json"
→ /bin/sh: 36: jq: not found
